payload.Description: DMT gold bad value ${PREFIX} exceeds MaximumSize

base_read.sql: SELECT fv.flex_value AS FLEX_VALUE, MAX(fv.flex_value_id) AS FLEX_VALUE_ID FROM fnd_flex_values fv JOIN fnd_flex_value_sets vs ON vs.flex_value_set_id = fv.flex_value_set_id WHERE vs.flex_value_set_name = '${VS_CODE}' AND fv.flex_value LIKE 'G${PREFIX}%' GROUP BY fv.flex_value

bad_read.sql: SELECT fv.flex_value AS FLEX_VALUE, MAX(fv.flex_value_id) AS FLEX_VALUE_ID FROM fnd_flex_values fv JOIN fnd_flex_value_sets vs ON vs.flex_value_set_id = fv.flex_value_set_id WHERE vs.flex_value_set_name = '${VS_CODE}' AND fv.flex_value LIKE 'B${PREFIX}%' GROUP BY fv.flex_value

verify.bad_absence_note: REST POST to valueSets/FA_MAJOR_CATEGORY/child/values rejected with HTTP 400 'The value ... is too long. (FND-2825)' at load time (Value exceeds the value set MaximumSize=20); the error detail is captured in the load result. A rejected value POST is atomic and creates no FND_FLEX_VALUES row, so rejection is proven by ABSENCE from base table FND_FLEX_VALUES for the seeded value set while the two good values from the same run reached FND_FLEX_VALUES with real FLEX_VALUE_IDs.
